title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — node.kubernetes.io/unreachable
text:
Type: Taint
Example:
node.kubernetes.io/unreachable: "NoExecute"
Used on: Node
The Node controller adds the taint to a Node corresponding to the
NodeCondition
Ready
being
Unknown
.

Type: Taint
Example:
node.kubernetes.io/unschedulable: "NoSchedule"
Used on: Node
The taint will be added to a node when initializing the node to avoid race condition.
